name: Crescent Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix 6 ounces of cream cheese with 3/4 cup sugar until well combined.
2. Add the egg yolk, lemon juice, and vanilla extract to the cream cheese mixture. Mix until thoroughly blended.
3. Place one package of crescent rolls on the bottom of a greased 9 x 13 inch pan.
4. Spread half of the cream cheese mixture over the rolls in the pan.
5. Top with another package of crescent rolls, pressed down gently to seal edges.
6. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
7. For glaze, whisk together powdered sugar, milk, and vanilla extract until smooth. Pour over hot rolls immediately after baking.
